avenues.name: Scored: the founding question gets a measured answer
avenues.thesis: Frozen across PREREG_truth (T1 at 75%, T2 at 65%): the winner and frontier rows reach conclusive measurements (>=40 events) within their caps. Both did -- 85 and 97 events -- and the certified result followed: at matched efficiency (0.0769) the loop's find beats the repetition benchmark 4.6x per-logical at the operating point, intervals cleanly apart.
avenues.signpost: resolved 2026-07-11 against the frozen criteria (PREREG_truth.md); 67.2M shots, 4.7h, zero wall-clock kills

avenues.name: Scored: repetition stays invisible and dominant
avenues.thesis: Frozen at 55% (T4): both repetition rows stay under 10 events at the caps AND their floors sit below the products -- the four-campaign throughline holding. FALSE twice over: rep-7 measured at 97 events, and it sits ABOVE both products. The old 'repetition dominates' was a resolution artifact of 200k-shot floors.

avenues.name: Scored: the frontier beats the winner
avenues.thesis: Frozen at 50% (T3): the search's deeper find (d=16) beats its simpler champion (d=12) per-logical with non-overlapping intervals. FALSE -- they are statistically TIED and the record leaves them tied; the extra distance bought nothing at the operating point, consistent with the decoder-trap mechanism.

avenues.name: Scored: a rare-event sampler beats brute force
avenues.thesis: Frozen at 50% (union PREREG Q3, after the count-stratified design had already run at measured parity): the Karp-Luby core-union sampler reproduces the truth band at 5x under the brute-force baseline. FALSE -- killed inside budget by its own registered criteria: the failure structure is combinatorially diffuse (>=1.6e4 minimal conspiracies at maximal generosity, ~3e7 at the measured mean) and the decoder rescues 93% of planted cores.
avenues.signpost: resolved 2026-07-10 against the frozen criteria (PREREG_union.md, Addendum 1)

avenues.name: Scored: the decoder is the majority culprit
avenues.thesis: Frozen at 60% (S1): decoder-created failures -- fault sets that flip nothing, where the 'correction' does the damage -- are the majority share on at least 4 of 5 codes. FALSE: a minority on 4 of 5 (8.5-35%), majority-indicated only on rep-7 (63%, interval spans the line). The measured surprise: the share spans sevenfold under the same decoder -- a property of the code-decoder pair.

avenues.name: Forward: decoder repair re-orders the leaderboard
avenues.thesis: Referee-v2 -- BP-OSD plus exact-trap post-processing, under the full instrument-change ritual -- moves at least one certified ordering on the five-code leaderboard. The measured sevenfold spread in decoder-created share says repair acts non-uniformly; rep-7 (indicated majority) has the most to gain against the 4.6x headline.
avenues.signpost: referee-v2 delta table on all five codes, committed by 2026-08-15

avenues.name: Forward: a cheap ruler finally gates
avenues.thesis: The published failure-spectrum ansatz, fitted by this chapter's exact stratified machinery on cheap strata, predicts operating-point eps within the certified bands on all six truth codes -- turning per-night grading into per-minute grading and making the discovery loop runnable on the number that matters.
avenues.signpost: ruler gate run against all six certified truths, committed by 2026-08-31

avenues.name: Forward: the crown -- below the floor
avenues.thesis: An AI-discovered code measured below rep-13's floor (2.31e-8 per-logical per-round) at competitive efficiency, on the certified instrument -- the outright operating-point crown, and the result a stranger would care about. Requires the ruler to gate, the loop to run on it, and a splitting-grade confirmation row.
avenues.signpost: a confirmed sub-floor row committed by 2026-12-31

avenues.name: Forward: low-weight codes reach the frontier overhead
avenues.thesis: Carried from Chapter 4, unresolved: weight-4-check codes reach the frontier qubit overhead at the high-bias operating point.
avenues.signpost: carried from Chapter 4; scores by end 2027

avenues.name: Forward: the field crosses the noise seam
avenues.thesis: Carried from Chapter 4, unresolved: a published AI code search grades itself at circuit level under hardware-calibrated noise.
avenues.signpost: carried from Chapter 4; scores by mid 2027

avenues.name: Forward: a multi-logical outer cat code on hardware
avenues.thesis: Carried from Chapter 4, unresolved: a multi-logical-qubit outer code demonstrated on cat-qubit hardware.
avenues.signpost: carried from Chapter 4; scores by end 2028

checks._comment: Single source of truth for the consistency-check RULES. Both index.html's console and verification/verify_numbers.py read these, so a threshold can never drift between the page and the verifier. Change a rule HERE and both sides enforce it on next run. (The check LOGIC is still written in each language -- see AUTHORING.md -- but the rules it enforces live only here.)
